name: com.apple.airplay
title: AirPlay
description: The payload that configures AirPlay settings.

payload.content: macOS supports more than one payload, iOS does not. Supported on the user channel for macOS only.

payloadkeys.title: AllowList
payloadkeys.content: If present, only AirPlay destinations in this list are available to the device. This allow list applies to supervised devices.

subkeys.title: Device ID
subkeys.content:
The device ID of the AirPlay destination in the format `xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx`. This field isn't case-sensitive.

The system limits the list of visible AirPlay destinations to devices that are present in the `AllowList` field of all installed AirPlay payloads.

Specifying the same MACAddress more than once, whether in the same payload across different payloads, results in undefined behavior.

As of tvOS 18, `DeviceID` isn't supported.

subkeys.title: Device Name
subkeys.content:
The name of the AirPlay device.

The system limits the list of visible AirPlay destinations to devices that are present in the `AllowList` field of all installed AirPlay payloads.

payloadkeys.title: Passwords
payloadkeys.content: If present, sets passwords for known AirPlay destinations. Using multiple entries for the same destination, whether within the same payload or across multiple installed payloads, is an error and results in undefined behavior.

subkeys.title: Device Name
subkeys.content: The name of the AirPlay destination; used in iOS, and available in macOS 15 and later.

subkeys.title: Password
subkeys.content: The password for the AirPlay destination.

The device ID of the AirPlay destination; used in macOS.

Deprecated in macOS 15 and later as tvOS 18 AirPlay destinations don't support it; use `DeviceName` instead.

payloadkeys.title: Whitelist
payloadkeys.content: Use `AllowList` instead. This key is deprecated in iOS 14.5 and macOS 11.3.

subkeys.title: Device ID
subkeys.content:
The device ID of the AirPlay destination in the format `xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx`. This field isn't case-sensitive.

The system limits the list of visible AirPlay destinations to devices that are present in the `AllowList` field of all installed AirPlay payloads.

Specifying the same MACAddress more than once, whether in the same payload across different payloads, results in undefined behavior.

As of tvOS 18, `DeviceID` isn't supported.

subkeys.title: Device Name
subkeys.content:
The name of the AirPlay device.

The system limits the list of visible AirPlay destinations to devices that are present in the `AllowList` field of all installed AirPlay payloads.
